# Features & Business Logic

## Daily review can generate implementation plans from suggestions

[Trigger]: When viewing the daily review detail page and reviewing accepted suggestions. [Detail]: Each suggestion in the daily_reviews detail view renders a 'Generate Plan' button. Clicking triggers POST /api/daily-reviews/:id/plan/generate, spawning an async process that reads the suggestion title/description and accumulated work history, invokes Opus via callClaude with stdin piping, parses the JSON plan response, and stores results. The plan_status column tracks progress: running → done or error. Frontend polls plan-status endpoint and renders the generated plan in a markdown card. [Consequence]: Without plan generation, developers must manually synthesize implementation plans from daily review suggestions.

_Source: `src/review/plan.js`_

_Tags: `feature`, `backend`, `frontend`_
